nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Eastern dwarf hornbill
nodes.summary: Eastern dwarf hornbill（Horizocerus granti）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Eastern dwarf hornbill。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门

nodes.name: 动物界

nodes.name: Horizocerus
nodes.summary: Horizocerus（Horizocerus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如Western long-tailed hornbill、Eastern long-tailed hornbill、Western dwarf hornbill等4种鸟类。

nodes.name: 刚果盆地
nodes.summary: 刚果盆地是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括剛果孔雀、Gabon coucal、Congo pied hornbill等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 鸟纲

nodes.name: Eastern dwarf hornbill
nodes.summary: The eastern dwarf hornbill (Horizocerus granti) is a species of hornbill in the family Bucerotidae. It is native to the Congo Basin. It was formerly considered to be a subspecies of the western dwarf hornbill (Horizocerus hartlaubi), with the English name "black dwarf hornbill". Taxonomy The eastern dwarf hornbill was formally described in 1895 by the German ornithologist Ernst Hartert based on a specimen collected near the Aruwimi River, a tributary of the Congo River, during the Emin Pasha Relief Expedition led by Henry Morton Stanley. Hartert coined the binomial name Lophoceros granti. The specific epithet was chosen to honour the Scottish ornithologist William Ogilvie-Grant. This species is placed in the genus Horizocerus that was introduced in 1899 by the American ornithologist Harry C. Oberholser. References
nodes.shortSummary: The eastern dwarf hornbill (Horizocerus granti) is a species of hornbill in the family Bucerotidae. It is native to the Congo Basin.
